content.json:
# Distributed tracing — dependency latency & failures
This workbook inspects end-to-end traces flowing through the service using Application Insights dependency telemetry.

content.query:
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| summarize AvgDurationMs = avg(DurationMs), FailedCount = countif(Success == false) by Target, Type
| sort by AvgDurationMs desc
content.title: Slowest dependencies (last hour)

content.query:
AppRequests
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| join kind=inner (AppDependencies) on OperationId
| project TimeGenerated, OperationId, Name, Target, DurationMs
content.title: End-to-end traces by operation
